# Hoyt: # Source: Hoyt et al. 2025 (arXiv:2503.11769) — Tables 6 and 7.
# Table 6 ("ref_..."): reference values from each SN source study
# from their own tables so that ⟨M_B⟩ exactly reproduces each study's
# published H₀ (inverse-variance-weighted average; off-diagonal elements of
# covariance populated for galaxies hosting >1 SN).
# resulting H₀ after applying (a) Hoyt 2025's ten JWST/F115W TRGB distances
# [jwst_only_...] and (b) the combined HST+JWST augmented sample of 24 TRGB
# distances [augmented_...]. The augmented sample uses the same Freedman
# 2025 Table 2 distances our pipeline's Case B bundle reads.
#   N_ref               = N calibrator SNe in reference-study analysis
#   H0_sigma_ref        = reference-study 1σ stat (where given; blank otherwise)
#   dist_source         = TRGB/Ceph anchor used in the reference study
#   jwst_only_N         = N calibrator SNe in Hoyt 2025 JWST-only recalibration
#   jwst_only_M_B_mag   = ⟨M_B⟩ after applying Hoyt 2025 JWST TRGB distances (10 hosts)
#   jwst_only_H0        = H₀ derived via Hoyt Eq. 15 in JWST-only subset
#   augmented_N         = N calibrator SNe in HST+JWST augmented sample (24 TRGB distances)
#   augmented_M_B_mag   = ⟨M_B⟩ after applying CCHP HST+JWST augmented TRGB sample
#   augmented_H0        = H₀ derived via Hoyt Eq. 15 in augmented subset
#   augmented_sigma_significance = significance of the H₀ shift vs. reference (σ)
